validation_results.name: Tests
validation_results.command: pnpm --filter @intelliflow/validators test -- --run src/__tests__/ticket.test.ts && pnpm --filter api test -- --run src/services/__tests__/TicketService.test.ts src/modules/ticket/__tests__/ticket-search.test.ts src/modules/ticket/__tests__/ticket.router.test.ts

kpi_results.actual: Architecture validated for MVP scale, 200ms warning threshold
180 ticket tests pass (84 validator + 66 service + 27 router + 3 search)
3 fields with Prisma contains + mode: insensitive

definition_of_done_items.criterion: ticketQuerySchema accepts optional search string (max 200 chars)
TicketService.findMany builds OR clause for subject/ticketNumber/contactName
ticket.router.ts list endpoint extracts search and passes to service
Search applies to total count (shared where clause)
definition_of_done_items.evidence: Same where variable used for findMany and count — verified by test

invariants_acknowledged: OR-clause search pattern matches Contact/Lead/Task entities
Multi-tenancy: tenantId always included in where clause
Prisma parameterized queries prevent SQL injection
Shared where clause ensures count matches findMany filter

notes: IFC-205: Ticket Full-Text Search. Re-validated 2026-02-15. Added case-insensitive partial-match search across subject, ticketNumber, and contactName fields using Prisma contains+insensitive (PostgreSQL ILIKE). TDD with 14 new search-specific tests (5 validator + 7 service + 3 router). Follows established OR-clause search pattern from Contact/Lead/Task entities. Container wiring verified: TicketService in container.ts:183, context.ts:213,352. Foundation STOA PASS, Domain STOA PASS. All 7 completion gates PASS.
